## Runtime.IRuntimeFillingRecipeVersion.scale() method

Scales this version to a target weight.

**Signature:**

```typescript
scale(targetWeight: Measurement, options?: IVersionScaleOptions): Result<IRuntimeScaledFillingRecipeVersion>;
```
